description.zh: Claude Code CLI 的开箱即用 persona · 通用编程助手, 偏好 anthropic-messages key。新用户点 'use claude-code' 时拿到这个,不用先写 PERSONA.md。
description.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the Claude Code CLI provider. Generic coding assistant; users get this on first 'use claude-code' click without authoring a PERSONA.md.
